chunks.page_summary: This page provides a technical drawing and installation specifications for a Rheonics SRV-SLP-A123-BH40 viscometer sensor installed in a DN40 jacketed elbow.

key_facts: The document details the installation of a Rheonics SRV-SLP sensor, specifically model SRV-SLP-A123-BH40.
The sensor is designed for installation into a DN40 jacketed elbow.
The sensor's connection type is a sanitary fitting, compliant with DIN 11851 standards.
The drawing illustrates the recommended flow direction within the jacketed elbow.
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The drawing is proprietary to Rheonics and is protected by US and International patents.
